utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items required in the format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all details (including costs): 1) health_coverage: includes physical and mental health insurance with explicit monthly costs and a total, plus coverage details. Fully specified. 2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with a monthly cost and coverage details. Fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with multiple components, each with costs, a total cost, and coverage details. Fully specified. 4) additional_services: includes enhancement services descriptions, but lacks explicit costs for these services; only references services without prices. Not fully specified per “with costs”. 5) total_budget: includes monthly and annual totals and extra details. Fully specified. Therefore, 4 out of 5 are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists specific products: PrimeCare Premium Health (physical health), Emergency Mental Health Care add-on, PrimeHome Premium, PrimeTravel Premium, 24/7 Travel Assistance, and Business Travel Support. I matched each to the closest exact-name entries in the ground-truth ratings. 'PrimeCare Premium Health' aligns with 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' under primary health physical. 'Emergency Mental Health Care' matches the health enhancement service of the same name. 'PrimeHome Premium' aligns with 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage'. 'PrimeTravel Premium' aligns with 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan'. '24/7 Travel Assistance' and 'Business Travel Support' match travel enhancement services of the same names.
